keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY FEMALE ORGANS. Female organs : Amb., Ap., Bell., Calc-c., Cham., Cimi., Con., Grap., Kali-c., Kre., Lach., Lil-t., Lyc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Plat., Pul., Sabi., Sec-c., Sep. , Sul., Thu., Vib. Female organs, external : Sep., Thu. Female organs, ovaries : Ap., Bell., Canth., Guai., Lach., Lyc., Pul., Stap., Thu. Female organs, vagina : Calc-c., Kali-c., Lyc., Merc., Pul., Sep., Sul. Female organs, uterus : Bell., Cham., Kali-c., Plat., Pul., Sabi., Sec-c., Sep. Female organs, uterus, painful : Ign. Female organs, uterus, tilted to left : Sep. Female organs, uterus, tilted to right : Murx., Pul. Female organs, abortus : Ap., Bell., Cham., Croc., Ip., Sabi., Sec-c., Sep., Vib. Female organs, abortus, habitual : Ap., Fer., Lyc., Plb., Sil., Syph., Thu. Female organs, abscess , labial, pus tubes, etc. : Lach., Merc., Pul., Sep. Female organs, adherent placenta : Pul., Sec-c. Female organs, after-pains : Arn., Cham., Cimi., Pul., Rhus-t., Sabi. Female organs, backward pains : Bell., Lil-t., Sep. Female organs, burning : Ars., Berb., Canth., Carb-an., Kre., Sec-c., Sul. Female organs, coition , agg. : Ap., Arg-n., Kre., Nat-m., Pul., Sep. Female organs, dryness : Berb., Lyc., Nat-m., Sep. Female organs, itching : Calad., Calc-c., Carb-v., Con., Nat-m., Sep., Sul., Tarn. Female organs, labour-like , or bearing down pains : Bell., Cham., Gels., Lil-t., Nux-v., Plat., Pul., Sabi., Sec-c., Sep., Vib. Female organs, labour pains , ceasing, weak, etc. : Bell., Gels., Kali-c., Op., Pul., Sec-c. Female organs, labour pains, false : Pul. Female organs, labour pains, inefficient : Caul., Cof., Nux-v. Female organs, labour pains, too painful, laborious or violent, etc. : Cham., Pul., Sec-c., Sep. Female organs, labour pains, spasms, with : Cham., Hyo., Ign., Pul. Female organs, lying , agg. : Fer., Kre., Murx., Pul. Female organs, motion , agg., bleeding : Croc., Sec-c. Female organs, puerperal infection, septic uterus : Ars., Bell., Lyc., Op., Pyro., Rhus-t., Sec-c., Sul. Female organs, sore , sensitive, painful : Ap., Canth., Cof., Con., Kre., Lach., Lil-t., Plat., Stap., Sul., Thu. Female organs, stooling , agg. : Amb., Pod., Stan. Female organs, swelled : Ap., Bell., Canth., Kre., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pul. Female organs, upward going : Alu., Cact., Calc-p., Coc-c., Elaps., Lach., Lil-t., Nit-ac., Pul., Sabi., Sep. Female organs, upward going, right : Alu., Ap., Croc., Lach., Lys., Murx. Female organs, upward going, left : Brom., Caul., Cimi., Kali-c., Lac-c., Lach., Lil-t., Naj., Sul. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
